description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by dense landscaping, including a variety of trees and shrubs. The house features a rectangular footprint with a moderately pitched gable roof in a muted brown color. Large, evenly spaced windows line the front facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. A driveway leads to an attached garage on the right side of the house, and a walkway connects the driveway to the main entryway. The property is bordered by a mix of tall and short trees, creating a sense of privacy and seclusion. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on symmetry and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, large front windows, an attached garage, and dense surrounding trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, garage, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, garage extension, and dense tree coverage on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by trees, with the back of the house and roofline visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, roof slope, and more of the backyard greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small overhang, steps, and a direct walkway from the driveway
